hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: We create modern workspaces for professionals

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description1: Inkar was created with the goal of providing professionals and entrepreneurs access to modern, comfortable, and productive workspaces.
mission.description2: We believe that the right work environment can significantly increase productivity and inspire new achievements.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the leading platform for booking coworking spaces in Kazakhstan, providing innovative solutions for the modern workplace.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Inkar was founded in 2020 by a group of entrepreneurs who faced the challenge of finding quality workspaces in Almaty.
story.paragraph2: We realized there was a great demand for flexible, modern, and affordable workspaces, and decided to create a platform that would simplify the booking process.
story.paragraph3: Today, Inkar connects dozens of coworking spaces and thousands of professionals, helping them find perfect workspaces to achieve their goals.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I book a workspace?
faq.a1: Simply register on our website, select a suitable workspace and date, then complete the booking online.
faq.a2: Yes, you can cancel a booking up to 24 hours before the start time. Full refund will be processed within 5-7 business days.
faq.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a3: We accept payments through Kaspi, bank cards (Visa, Mastercard), and cash upon visit.
faq.q4: Are there discounts for long-term bookings?
faq.a4: Yes, we offer discounts up to 30% for bookings of 3 months or more. Contact us for a personalized offer.
